title: Insufficient Authorization Controls
description: The absence of details regarding authorization mechanisms creates a significant risk of privilege escalation. Attackers could potentially exploit vulnerabilities to gain elevated privileges, allowing them to perform actions beyond their intended scope and compromise the entire system.
attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the authorization logic, bypassing access controls, or leveraging default credentials.
mitigations: Implement robust authorization controls based on the principle of least privilege.
Regularly review and update authorization policies.
Conduct penetration testing to identify and remediate authorization vulnerabilities.
